title: Backend Compiler Engineer (New College Grad 2026)
raw_post:
[NVIDIA](https://www.linkedin.com/company/nvidia/) is hiring Backend Compiler Engineers (New College Grad 2026).

If you're graduating in 2026 and interested in systems programming, compilers, GPUs, or AI infrastructure, this is definitely an opportunity worth checking out.

Highlights:

 ✅ Backend Compiler Engineer (New College Grad 2026)
 ✅ Full-time role in Santa Clara, CA
 ✅ Work on GPU compiler technologies for Graphics and CUDA platforms
 ✅ Build high performance compiler infrastructure using C++ and related technologies
 ✅ Join one of the leading companies driving the AI revolution

This is a great opportunity for students who enjoy low-level programming, performance optimization, compiler design, and building software that powers modern AI.

🔗 Application link: [https://lnkd.in/gsvZGt3X
